CONTENT.Career: A youth product of Chauny, Sainte-Luce joined Nîmes at the age of 17. He made his professional debut for Nîmes in a 3–1 Ligue 1 win over Rennes on 9 April 2019.On 23 May 2022, Sainte-Luce signed a pre-contract agreement with Nîmes's rivals Montpellier.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in metropolitan France, Sainte-Luce is of Guadeloupean descent.
CONTENT.External links: Théo Sainte-Luce – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchMHSC ProfileThéo Sainte-Luce at L'Équipe Football (in French)Théo Sainte-Luce at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Théo Sainte-Luce (born 20 October 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a left-back for  Ligue 1 club Montpellier.
